(:action unstack
    :parameters (c e)
    :precondition
      (and
        (on c e)
        (clear c)
        (arm-free)
      )
    :effect
      (and
        (holding c)
        (clear e)
        (not
          (clear c)
        )
        (not
          (arm-free)
        )
        (not
          (on c e)
        )
      )
  )
